posts.author: himanth22 (Himanth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am new to Monday community.

I am trying to format the mirror column to number type to use automation
“When a number is greater than a value, change status to something”.
To use this automation, the summary column has to be altered to number type.
Please help with it.
